sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111631" key="fi/lubris" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φίλ-υβρις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[φῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111631.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of wanton violence,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Theb.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
